chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.S-262 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. Harish Chander advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Asif Zai advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh. Heard arguments of the learned counsel for the parties at length and reserved for judgment. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
